message:
test: add VEF proof scheduler support tests and bd-3ptu verification reports

- Add VEF proof scheduler support conformance test (crate-level and perf tests)
- Add bd-3ptu check report, self-test results, and unit test output for
  Section 10.18 verification evidence

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
